hero.title: Verifiable Policy. Uncompromised Access.
hero.subtitle: We rescue and rebuild highly regulated government systems. We combine deep technical architecture with policy expertise to ensure state systems pass federal audits, work for caseworkers, and actually serve residents.

challenge.label: The Modernization Trap
challenge.title: Technology Must Follow the Law.
challenge.text: State agencies spent millions moving to the cloud, but caseworkers and residents are still trapped in red tape. The mandate now is to fix these tightly coupled systems. We untangle broken infrastructure to stop federal audit penalties, reduce caseworker burnout, and guarantee services reach the public.
challenge.solution: We deploy clear policy engineering, strict system boundaries, and frontline change management to legally secure complex platforms and eliminate administrative burden.

infrastructure.label: Holistic Oversight
infrastructure.title: Structural & Operational Rescues.
infrastructure.text: We deploy strict technical rules alongside frontline support to force actual agility inside bureaucratic environments.

sandbox.label: Simulator 01
sandbox.title: Automated Policy Testing
sandbox.text: See how we use mathematical logic to test and verify legislative changes before they ever reach live code.

manual.label: Simulator 02
manual.title: The Time Tax Audit
manual.text: See how we measure the exact administrative burden placed on residents to legally defend your state's policy choices.

extraction.label: Simulator 03
extraction.title: Immutable Appeal Records
extraction.text: See how we freeze system data to create an unquestionable, secure record for legal appeals and fair hearings.

hero.label: Capabilities
hero.title: Systems Rescue & Policy Engineering
hero.subtitle: We provide targeted engineering, legal defense, and strategic advice to state agencies trapped by failed IT deployments and crippling federal audits.

statutory.title: Verifiable Policy & Legal Defense
statutory.text: We ensure your IT systems accurately reflect the law. We use automated tools to verify that state policies are coded correctly, and we measure the 'Time Tax' on residents to legally defend your decisions against unfunded federal mandates.

rulesEngine.title: AI Governance & Secure Infrastructure
rulesEngine.text: We protect sensitive federal data and prevent algorithmic bias. We build secure, self-hosted gateways to protect IRS and HIPAA data, ensuring new automation tools help residents instead of harming them.

sanction.title: Smart Procurement & Breaking Lock-In
sanction.text: We legally block vendor lock-in. We write strict technical rules for your RFPs to prevent massive vendors from holding your state hostage, and we help fund these rescues by braiding federal grants with civic philanthropy.

data.title: Frontline Operations & Workforce Design
data.text: Technology fails if caseworkers cannot use it. We design systems around the people who actually do the work, eliminating volunteer dependency and building professional, empowered state workforces.

sprint.title: Targeted Architectural Rescue
sprint.text: Rapid deployments to find and fix critical flaws, security vulnerabilities, or logic errors in live government systems.

advisory.title: Technical Expert Advisory
advisory.text: Long-term partnership acting as the State's technical authority for federal audit defense, vendor oversight, and testing new policies.

integration.title: RFP Engineering & Procurement
integration.text: End-to-end consulting to write the technical rules of massive state RFPs, ensuring you retain control of your own infrastructure.

hero.label: Research
hero.title: Threat Intelligence & Diagnostics
hero.subtitle: Clear, authoritative analysis on why government tech deployments fail, how vendors trap states, and how to survive federal audits.

adv1.title: Legal Defense via Time Tax Audits
adv1.desc: How to use hard data on administrative burden to challenge unfunded federal mandates in court.

adv2.title: Protecting Data with Secure Gateways
adv2.desc: The severe risks of using commercial cloud platforms for state benefits, and how to build secure alternatives.

adv3.title: Testing Policy with Mathematical Verification
adv3.desc: Why standard software testing fails government systems, and how to simulate policy changes accurately.

adv4.title: Ending Volunteer Dependency
adv4.desc: Why states must stop relying on volunteers to deliver benefits, and how to build a professional state workforce.

adv5.title: Fighting Federal Payment Penalties
adv5.desc: How state agencies can use data to prove systemic vendor flaws and successfully fight federal audit fines.

adv6.title: Defeating Vendor Lock-In via RFP Design
adv6.desc: How massive tech vendors exploit vague RFPs, and how to write strict technical rules to force them to open up.

founder.title: Founder Dossier
founder.intro: We diagnose and fix the critical flaws hidden inside massive government systems.
founder.p1: Applied Policy Systems was established to guide state agencies out of the 'Modernization Trap.' States spent hundreds of millions moving to the cloud, only to realize they bought rigidly coupled systems that ignore frontline realities and fail federal audits.
founder.p2: We act as the ultimate strategic failsafe for State CIOs and Agency Directors. We combine deep engineering with legal defense and organizational design to untangle broken systems, force vendors to open their architecture, and secure federal compliance.
